# SignificantUpdateAction

**Structure**

An action that presents a system sheet for significant app update acknowledgements.

## Declaration

```swift
struct SignificantUpdateAction
```

## Overview

Use this function to inform people about important changes to your app that require their acknowledgement and consent before proceeding.

## Presenting acknowledgements

- **callAsFunction(updateDescription:)**: Shows the significant update acknowledgement interface.

items.description: Shows the significant update acknowledgement interface.
items.name: callAsFunction(updateDescription:)
